name_en: 24p Purple Blue Tweed CF. Absolutely love it and can't wait to get it. It's a total surprise. Wearing it will make you the most unique and eye-catching little fairy. Elegant and fashionable is its name. A bright and lovely atmosphere for spring and summer. Tweed material, lined with sheepskin. The capacity is more than enough for shopping or dates. Sharing one with a bestie is just too beautiful. This is a super long-lasting bestseller you can carry for years.
